'''竏嗄-sh-b-g''' ('''kamashbegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stampedo|stampedo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stampedo|stampedo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗄-sh-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| kamashbegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimashbegoko|thimashbegoko]] || [[word:jimashbegoko|jimashbegoko]] || [[word:shimashbegoko|shimashbegoko]] || [[word:kimashbegoko|kimashbegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumashbegoko|thuthumashbegoko]] || [[word:jujumashbegoko|jujumashbegoko]] || [[word:shushumashbegoko|shushumashbegoko]] || [[word:kukumashbegoko|kukumashbegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumashbegoko|thumashbegoko]] || [[word:jumashbegoko|jumashbegoko]] || [[word:shumashbegoko|shumashbegoko]] || [[word:kumashbegoko|kumashbegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumashbegoko|thumashbegoko]] || [[word:jumashbegoko|jumashbegoko]] || [[word:shumashbegoko|shumashbegoko]] || [[word:kumashbegoko|kumashbegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themashbegoko|themashbegoko]] || [[word:jemashbegoko|jemashbegoko]] || [[word:shemashbegoko|shemashbegoko]] || [[word:kemashbegoko|kemashbegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomashbegoko|thothomashbegoko]] || [[word:jojomashbegoko|jojomashbegoko]] || [[word:shoshomashbegoko|shoshomashbegoko]] || [[word:kokomashbegoko|kokomashbegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomashbegoko|thomashbegoko]] || [[word:jomashbegoko|jomashbegoko]] || [[word:shomashbegoko|shomashbegoko]] || [[word:komashbegoko|komashbegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomashbegoko|thomashbegoko]] || [[word:jomashbegoko|jomashbegoko]] || [[word:shomashbegoko|shomashbegoko]] || [[word:komashbegoko|komashbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦmashbegoko|thﾃｦmashbegoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦmashbegoko|jﾃｦmashbegoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦmashbegoko|shﾃｦmashbegoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦmashbegoko|kﾃｦmashbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamashbegoko|thathamashbegoko]] || [[word:jajamashbegoko|jajamashbegoko]] || [[word:shashamashbegoko|shashamashbegoko]] || [[word:kakamashbegoko|kakamashbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamashbegoko|thamashbegoko]] || [[word:jamashbegoko|jamashbegoko]] || [[word:shamashbegoko|shamashbegoko]] || [[word:kamashbegoko|kamashbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamashbegoko|thamashbegoko]] || [[word:jamashbegoko|jamashbegoko]] || [[word:shamashbegoko|shamashbegoko]] || [[word:kamashbegoko|kamashbegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
